turns.user_message: I get this hollow feeling in my chest when I think about us lately. It used to be something I could just shake off.
That hollow ache has become my constant companion now. I keep waiting for things to feel solid between us again.
The emptiness has spread and I feel completely untethered. I don't know how to fill the space where we used to be.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens by describing a physical feeling. This used to not bother the speaker.
